query:
INSERT INTO course_prerequisites (courseId, prerequisiteCourseId)
SELECT c1.id, c2.id
FROM courses c1
CROSS JOIN courses c2
WHERE c2.title = 'Introduction to Theology'
  AND c1.title IN ('Biblical Hermeneutics', 'Christian Ethics', 'Prayer and Intercession', 'Spiritual Warfare', 'Evangelism')
